description_long: This bench features a long, rectangular seat with a blue surface, supported by a sturdy black frame. The seat appears to be made from a solid, possibly metal or composite material, with a smooth finish and no visible cushioning. The bench is supported by four angled legs, two on each side, connected by a horizontal support bar beneath the seat for added stability. There are no backrests or armrests, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The design suggests durability and resistance to outdoor elements, making it suitable for public spaces such as parks or sidewalks. The color contrast between the blue seat and black frame adds a modern touch to its otherwise functional form.
description: A long, blue bench with a black frame and four angled legs, featuring a minimalist, backless design. The bench is sturdy and modern, suitable for outdoor public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the blue seat and the black frame with angled legs and a horizontal support bar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the bench and the thickness of the seat and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the blue seat and black frame with visible support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the structure of the legs and seat.
attribute_leg_design: four angled metal legs with a horizontal support bar
